$comment: scripts/ViridianCity.asm ViridianCityMovePlayerDownScript — the cell below the gym door at (32,7): one simulated PAD_DOWN, and (32,9) is a down-ledge, so the press hops the player clean over it back onto the street (gh #86). The badge terms cover the just-earned-seventh-badge walk-up before the latch record has run on a reload.

trigger.when: not VIRIDIAN_GYM_OPEN and not (badge_boulderbadge and badge_cascadebadge and badge_thunderbadge and badge_rainbowbadge and badge_soulbadge and badge_marshbadge and badge_volcanobadge)
